category_sources: Official GPSBabel documentation describes converting, uploading, and downloading data from GPS and map programs.
source_facts.description says GPSBabel converts/uploads GPS waypoints, tracks, and routes.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository use GPSBabel.
docs_sources: Official GPSBabel documentation index links versioned manuals for GPSBabel 1.10.0 and the development version.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/GPSBabel/gpsbabel; per instruction, repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GPSBabel docs identify conversion, upload, and download of GPS and map-program data.
source_facts.description lists GPS waypoints, tracks, and routes.
